title: Undo Craft
description: Accidentally crafted the wrong item? Instantly undo your last crafting action with CTRL+Z or an in-game button. Supports Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge with a full drag-and-drop config editor!
body:
# 🔄 Undo Craft

Have you ever accidentally crafted a stack of the wrong item or wasted valuable resources by misclicking at the crafting table? **Undo Craft** is here to save your day! With this client-side utility mod, you can instantly undo your last crafting action, recover all your ingredients completely, and keep your inventory perfectly organized. --- ## ✨ Features * **Accidental Craft Recovery**: Reverts the most recent crafting action (single crafts or full shift-clicked/quick-move stacks) instantly. * **Visual Position Editor**: Features a fully interactive, tabbed drag-and-drop config screen. Easily place the Undo button exactly where you want it. * **Dual-Screen Settings**: Set independent button coordinates for the **3x3 Crafting Table** and the **2x2 Survival Inventory**. * **Highly Custom Keybind**: Press `CTRL + Z` to trigger the undo action without even clicking the button! * **100% Client-Side**: Safe to use on any server! Positioning, UI widgets, and validation are handled locally without requiring server-side installation. * **Multi-Version & Multi-Loader Support**: Fully natively optimized for Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge across multiple versions. --- ## 📸 Screenshots

--- ## 🎮 How to Use 1. Open any **Crafting Table** or your **Survival Inventory**. 2. Perform a crafting action. 3. Click the **↶** (Undo) button on the screen, or simply press **`CTRL + Z`**. 4. Get all your original crafting ingredients refunded instantly! *Note: The undo history only stores the very last crafting action. Opening a new crafting session, closing the screen, or performing another craft will reset the undo buffer.* --- ## 🛠️ Configuration You can fully customize the button offsets in real-time! Access the visual positioning editor through: * **Fabric**: Configure button inside **ModMenu**. * **Forge / NeoForge**: Access the client config editor directly. * *Alternatively, configure coordinates manually in `config/undo-craft.json`.* --- ## 📥 Loader & Version Compatibility | Minecraft Version | Fabric | Forge | NeoForge | |:-------------------|:------:|:-----:|:--------:| | **1.20.1** | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | | **1.21.4** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | **26.1.2+** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | --- **Developer:** Musa
